text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to interpret and understand visual information from the world. Using techniques like image recognition, computers can identify objects, faces, or scenes in photos and videos. Object detection goes further by locating specific items, such as cars or pedestrians, within an image. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, in self-driving cars, computer vision helps the vehicle recognize traffic signs, detect obstacles, and navigate safely. It is also used in security systems, medical imaging, and even smartphones for features like facial recognition. As the technology improves, its impact on our daily lives will continue to grow.
